signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Defenders with this ability have a larger timing window for landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in any mid-field zone coverage, less than 20 yards from the LoS inside the numbers and 10-20 outside.
Players with this ability are more likely to succeed at and attempt diving catches and swats.
Defenders with this ability allow fewer broken tackles and cause more fumbles when cut-sticking ballcarriers.
When Selfless players are making plays their teammates are motivated to perform better. When they enter the zone, all on field teammates enter the zone as well.
Defenders with this ability can apply pressure to the quarterback from a greater distance.
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Defenders with this ability will cause heavy fatigue penalties when tackling a ballcarrier with a hit-stick tackle.
Some players thrive on making defenders look silly. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their fakeout rate on the next juke, spin or hurdle.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke animations.
Ballcarriers with this ability can quickly shift momentum, change direction, and turn the corner without sacrificing speed.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke and spin animations.
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all unpressured throws while their feet are set in the pocket (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability can make all hot route and blocking adjustments twice as fast (excluding audibles).
Elite pass rushers are a mix of strength, speed, and tenacity. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their win rate and block shed speed against one-on-one pass blocks.
Defenders with this ability use faster, more dominant pass rush moves while rushing from the edge of the defense.
Defenders with this ability are granted a free pass rush move once per play after spending stamina to perform one
Defenders with this ability use faster run shed moves for a better chance at shedding blocks against outside zone plays.
Defenders with this ability will clear a ballcarrier's progress towards entering the zone with a hit-stick tackle.
Blockers with this ability will dominantly win impact blocks on screen plays
Blockers with this ability start every new blocking encounter with built-in resistance
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Blockers with this ability are almost guaranteed to win any double team block they are engaged in
